lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਧਨ ਮੇਰੀ ਚਿੰਤ ਵਿਸਾਰੀ ਹਰਿ ਧਨਿ ਲਾਹਿਆ ਧੋਖਾ ॥
lines.translit: har dhan meree chint visaaree har dhan laahiaa dhokhaa |
lines.english: Through the wealth of the Lord, I have forgotten my anxiety; through the wealth of the Lord, my doubt has been dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਧਨ ਤੇ ਮੈ ਨਵ ਨਿਧਿ ਪਾਈ ਹਾਥਿ ਚਰਿਓ ਹਰਿ ਥੋਕਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har dhan te mai nav nidh paaee haath chario har thokaa |3|
lines.english: From the wealth of the Lord, I have obtained the nine treasures; the true essence of the Lord has come into my hands. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਾਵਹੁ ਖਰਚਹੁ ਤੋਟਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਹਲਤ ਪਲਤ ਕੈ ਸੰਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: khaavahu kharachahu tott na aavai halat palat kai sange |
lines.english: No matter how much I eat and expend this wealth, it is not exhausted; here and hereafter, it remains with me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਦਿ ਖਜਾਨਾ ਗੁਰਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਉ ਦੀਆ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਰੰਗੇ ॥੪॥੨॥੩॥
lines.translit: laad khajaanaa gur naanak kau deea ihu man har rang range |4|2|3|
lines.english: Loading the treasure, Guru Nanak has given it, and this mind is imbued with the Lord's Love. ||4||2||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਸਭਿ ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਨਾਸਹਿ ਪਿਤਰੀ ਹੋਇ ਉਧਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: jis simarat sabh kilavikh naaseh pitaree hoe udhaaro |
lines.english: Remembering Him, all sins are erased, and ones generations are saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੂਜਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: goojaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Goojaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਤਾ ਮਾਤਾ ਕੀ ਆਸੀਸ ॥
lines.translit: pootaa maataa kee aasees |
lines.english: O son, this is your mother's hope and prayer,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਤੁਮੑ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਜਾਪਹੁ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਰੋ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: so har har tuma sad hee jaapahu jaa kaa ant na paaro |1|
lines.english: So meditate continually on the Lord, Har, Har; He has no end or limitation. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਤੁਮੑ ਕਉ ਹੋਇ ਦਇਆਲਾ ਸੰਤਸੰਗਿ ਤੇਰੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: satigur tuma kau hoe deaalaa santasang teree preet |
lines.english: May the True Guru be kind to you, and may you love the Society of the Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਮਖ ਨ ਬਿਸਰਉ ਤੁਮੑ ਕਉ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਦਾ ਭਜਹੁ ਜਗਦੀਸ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: nimakh na bisrau tuma kau har har sadaa bhajahu jagadees |1| rahaau |
lines.english: that you may never forget the Lord, Har, Har, even for an instant. May you ever vibrate upon the Lord of the Universe. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਪੜੁ ਪਤਿ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੁ ਰਾਖੀ ਭੋਜਨੁ ਕੀਰਤਨੁ ਨੀਤਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kaaparr pat paramesar raakhee bhojan keeratan neet |2|
lines.english: May the preservation of your honor by the Transcendent Lord be your clothes, and may the singing of His Praises be your food. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਗ ਤਮਾਸਾ ਪੂਰਨ ਆਸਾ ਕਬਹਿ ਨ ਬਿਆਪੈ ਚਿੰਤਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: rang tamaasaa pooran aasaa kabeh na biaapai chintaa |3|
lines.english: May joy and pleasure be yours; may your hopes be fulfilled, and may you never be troubled by worries. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਵਹੁ ਸਦਾ ਚਿਰੁ ਜੀਵਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਅਨਦ ਅਨੰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: amrit peevahu sadaa chir jeevahu har simarat anad anantaa |
lines.english: So drink in forever the Ambrosial Nectar; may you live long, and may the meditative remembrance of the Lord give you infinite delight.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸੁ ਉਨ ਸੰਗਿ ਲਪਟਾਇਓ ਜਿਉ ਬੂੰਦਹਿ ਚਾਤ੍ਰਿਕੁ ਮਉਲਾ ॥੪॥੩॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak daas un sang lapattaaeo jiau boondeh chaatrik maulaa |4|3|4|
lines.english: Says servant Nanak, attach your mind to them, and blossom forth like the song-bird, upon finding the rain-drop. ||4||3||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਵਰੁ ਤੁਮੑਾਰਾ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਹੋਵਉ ਹਰਿ ਚਰਣਾ ਹੋਹੁ ਕਉਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: bhavar tumaaraa ihu man hovau har charanaa hohu kaulaa |
lines.english: Let this mind of yours be the bumble bee, and let the Lord's feet be the lotus flower.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੂਜਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: goojaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Goojaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤਾ ਕਰੈ ਪਛਮ ਕੈ ਤਾਈ ਪੂਰਬ ਹੀ ਲੈ ਜਾਤ ॥
lines.translit: mataa karai pachham kai taaee poorab hee lai jaat |
lines.english: He decides to go to the west, but the Lord leads him away to the east.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਥਾਪਿ ਉਥਾਪਨਹਾਰਾ ਆਪਨ ਹਾਥਿ ਮਤਾਤ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: khin meh thaap uthaapanahaaraa aapan haath mataat |1|
lines.english: In an instant, He establishes and disestablishes; He holds all matters in His hands. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਆਨਪ ਕਾਹੂ ਕਾਮਿ ਨ ਆਤ ॥
lines.translit: siaanap kaahoo kaam na aat |
lines.english: Cleverness is of no use at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਅਨਰੂਪਿਓ ਠਾਕੁਰਿ ਮੇਰੈ ਹੋਇ ਰਹੀ ਉਹ ਬਾਤ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo anaroopio tthaakur merai hoe rahee uh baat |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Whatever my Lord and Master deems to be right - that alone comes to pass. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਸੁ ਕਮਾਵਨ ਧਨ ਜੋਰਨ ਕੀ ਮਨਸਾ ਬੀਚੇ ਨਿਕਸੇ ਸਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: des kamaavan dhan joran kee manasaa beeche nikase saas |
lines.english: In his desire to acquire land and accumulate wealth, one's breath escapes him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਇ ਅਨੰਨਿ ਮਨਹਠ ਕੀ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਤਾ ਆਪਸ ਕਉ ਜਾਨਾਤ ॥
lines.translit: hoe anan manahatth kee drirrataa aapas kau jaanaat |
lines.english: Believing himself to be unique, he clings to his stubborn mind, and shows himself off.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਸਕਰ ਨੇਬ ਖਵਾਸ ਸਭ ਤਿਆਗੇ ਜਮ ਪੁਰਿ ਊਠਿ ਸਿਧਾਸ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: lasakar neb khavaas sabh tiaage jam pur aootth sidhaas |2|
lines.english: He must leave all his armies, assistants and servants; rising up, he departs to the City of Death. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਅਨਿੰਦੁ ਨਿੰਦੁ ਕਰਿ ਛੋਡਿਓ ਸੋਈ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਖਾਤ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jo anind nind kar chhoddio soee fir fir khaat |3|
lines.english: That food, which the blameless people have condemned and discarded, he eats again and again. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਭੇਟਿਆ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ਗਿਰਸਤ ਉਦਾਸ ॥੪॥੪॥੫॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak gur pooraa bhettiaa paravaan girasat udaas |4|4|5|
lines.english: Says Nanak, one who meets the Perfect Guru, is celebrated as a householder as well as a renunciate. ||4||4||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜ ਸੁਭਾਇ ਭਏ ਕਿਰਪਾਲਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਜਨ ਕੀ ਕਾਟੀ ਫਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: sehaj subhaae bhe kirapaalaa tis jan kee kaattee faas |
lines.english: One, unto whom the Lord shows His natural mercy, has the noose of Death cut away from him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੂਜਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: goojaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Goojaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧ ਮਾਇਆ ਬਿਖੁ ਮਮਤਾ ਇਹ ਬਿਆਧਿ ਤੇ ਹਾਟੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh maaeaa bikh mamataa ih biaadh te haatte |1|
lines.english: Sexual desirer, anger, the poison of Maya and egotism - they are rid of these afflictions. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਜਨਿ ਜਪਿਓ ਤਿਨ ਕੇ ਬੰਧਨ ਕਾਟੇ ॥
lines.translit: naam nidhaan jin jan japio tin ke bandhan kaatte |
lines.english: Those humble beings who chant the treasure of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, have their bonds broken.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਗਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: har jas saadhasang mil gaaeo |
lines.english: One who joins the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, and chants the Praises of the Lord,

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਭਇਓ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਸਰਬ ਸੁਖਾ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਇਅਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaad bheo man niramal sarab sukhaa sukh paaeaau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: has his mind purified, by Guru's Grace, and he obtains the joy of all joys. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕੀਓ ਸੋਈ ਭਲ ਮਾਨੈ ਐਸੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਮਾਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh keeo soee bhal maanai aisee bhagat kamaanee |
lines.english: Whatever the Lord does, he sees that as good; such is the devotional service he performs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਨ ਪੂਰਿ ਰਹਿਓ ਸ੍ਰਬ ਥਾਈ ਆਨ ਨ ਕਤਹੂੰ ਜਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: pooran poor rahio srab thaaee aan na katahoon jaataa |
lines.english: The all-pervading Lord is fully filling all places; why should I go anywhere else?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਤ੍ਰ ਸਤ੍ਰੁ ਸਭ ਏਕ ਸਮਾਨੇ ਜੋਗ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਨੀਸਾਨੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: mitr satru sabh ek samaane jog jugat neesaanee |2|
lines.english: He sees friends and enemies as all the same; this is the sign of the Way of Yoga. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਰਬ ਨਿਰੰਤਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਵਿਓ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt antar sarab nirantar rang ravio rang raataa |3|
lines.english: He is permeating and pervading within each and every heart; I am immersed in His Love, dyed in the color of His Love. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਏ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਦਇਆਲ ਗੁਪਾਲਾ ਤਾ ਨਿਰਭੈ ਕੈ ਘਰਿ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhe kripaal deaal gupaalaa taa nirabhai kai ghar aaeaa |
lines.english: When the Lord of the Universe becomes kind and compassionate, then one enters the home of the Fearless Lord.
